投资.description: 市场、宏观、利率、公司与资产价格

items.title: SK Hynix stock opens at $170 on Nasdaq, as trillion-dollar chip company welcomes U.S. investors
items.analysis_zh: SK海力士的股票在纳斯达克以170美元开盘，标志着这家市值达到万亿美元的芯片公司迎来了美国投资者。SK海力士为一些全球最大的科技公司提供服务，包括英伟达和苹果，这使其在市场上获得了巨大的成功。这一事件不仅反映了芯片行业的强劲需求，也可能吸引更多投资者关注半导体领域，进一步推动相关技术的发展。
items.analysis_en: SK Hynix's stock opened at $170 on Nasdaq, marking the company's welcome to U.S. investors as it reaches a trillion-dollar market cap. By serving some of the largest tech companies in the world, including Nvidia and Apple, SK Hynix has achieved significant success in the market. This event not only highlights the strong demand in the semiconductor industry but may also attract more investors to focus on the semiconductor sector, potentially driving further advancements in related technologies.

items.title: All entry-level jobs require 3-5 years of experience. How am I supposed to get that if no one will hire me?
items.analysis_zh: 最近，许多入门级职位都要求应聘者具备3到5年的工作经验，这让许多求职者感到困惑和沮丧。这样的要求使得刚毕业的学生和转行者在寻找第一份工作的过程中面临重大挑战。这一现象不仅影响了年轻人的就业机会，也可能导致劳动力市场的技能短缺。若不改变这种趋势，企业将难以找到合适的人才，而求职者也将陷入无尽的循环。
items.analysis_en: Recently, many entry-level jobs are requiring candidates to have 3 to 5 years of experience, leaving many job seekers feeling confused and frustrated. This demand creates significant challenges for recent graduates and career changers trying to land their first job. This trend not only affects the employment opportunities for young people but may also lead to a skills shortage in the labor market. If this situation does not change, companies will struggle to find suitable talent, while job seekers may find themselves stuck in an endless cycle.

items.title: Stablecoin issuer Circle just got the greenlight to operate as a bank. The shares are up 5%
items.analysis_zh: 稳定币发行商Circle获得了美国货币监理署的批准，可以作为信托银行运营。这一消息使得Circle的股票在盘前交易中上涨了5%。这一批准不仅标志着Circle在金融领域的进一步发展，也可能为其他稳定币发行商开辟新的银行业务模式。这一变化可能会影响数字货币市场的监管环境，并推动更多金融创新。
items.analysis_en: Stablecoin issuer Circle has received approval from the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to operate as a trust bank. This news led to a 5% increase in Circle's shares during premarket trading. This approval not only signifies Circle's advancement in the financial sector but may also pave the way for other stablecoin issuers to explore new banking business models. This change could impact the regulatory landscape of the digital currency market and encourage further financial innovation.

items.title: Trump says U.S. to continue talks with Iran despite scrapped ceasefire
items.analysis_zh: 特朗普表示，尽管最近美国与伊朗之间的停火协议遭到严重破坏，但美国仍将继续与伊朗进行对话。过去几天，美国和伊朗的军事冲突频繁发生，这使得上个月签署的停火协议岌岌可危。这一局势不仅影响了美伊关系，也可能对中东地区的安全局势产生深远影响，增加了各方的紧张情绪。
items.analysis_en: Trump stated that the U.S. will continue talks with Iran despite the recent breakdown of the ceasefire agreement. In recent days, there have been consecutive military clashes between U.S. and Iranian forces, putting the ceasefire signed last month under significant strain. This situation not only affects U.S.-Iran relations but could also have far-reaching implications for security in the Middle East, escalating tensions among various parties involved.

items.title: Energizer stock rises as major shareholder adds to position
items.analysis_zh: Energizer公司的股票因其主要股东增持股份而上涨。这一举动表明股东对公司未来发展的信心，可能会吸引更多投资者关注该股票。股东的增持通常被视为对公司业绩的积极信号，可能会进一步推动股价上涨。
items.analysis_en: Energizer's stock has risen as a major shareholder has increased their position. This move indicates confidence in the company's future, which may attract more investors to the stock. Shareholder buy-ins are generally seen as a positive signal regarding the company's performance, potentially leading to further increases in stock prices.

items.title: Bank of America data shows retail spending rose in June
items.analysis_zh: 根据美国银行的数据，六月份零售支出有所上升。这一趋势表明消费者信心正在恢复，可能会推动经济增长。零售支出的增加不仅对商家有利，也可能影响到就业市场和整体经济复苏的速度。分析人士认为，这一数据可能会影响未来的货币政策和投资决策。
items.analysis_en: According to data from Bank of America, retail spending increased in June. This trend indicates a recovery in consumer confidence, which could drive economic growth. The rise in retail spending benefits businesses and may also impact the job market and the overall pace of economic recovery. Analysts believe this data could influence future monetary policy and investment decisions.

items.title: AI, data center fears could be key in closely watched Michigan Democratic Senate primary
items.analysis_zh: 在即将于8月4日举行的密歇根州民主党参议院初选中，阿卜杜勒·埃尔-萨耶德与众议员哈莉·史蒂文斯将展开激烈角逐。这场选举备受关注，原因在于候选人对人工智能和数据中心的不同看法可能会影响选民的选择。这不仅关乎密歇根州的未来发展，也可能对全国范围内的民主党政策方向产生影响。
items.analysis_en: In the upcoming Michigan Democratic Senate primary on August 4, Abdul El-Sayed and Rep. Haley Stevens will face off in a highly anticipated contest. This election is significant because the candidates have differing views on artificial intelligence and data centers, which may influence voter preferences. The outcome could not only shape the future of Michigan but also impact the Democratic Party's policy direction on a national level.

items.title: Why is Nike stock rallying today?
items.analysis_zh: 今天，耐克的股票出现了显著上涨，主要是由于公司发布了强劲的季度财报，超出了市场预期。这一表现不仅提升了投资者的信心，也可能吸引更多的资金流入耐克的股票。耐克的成功反映了其在运动服饰市场的持续竞争力，对整个行业的投资情绪也有积极影响。
items.analysis_en: Today, Nike's stock experienced a significant rally, primarily due to the company releasing a strong quarterly earnings report that exceeded market expectations. This performance not only boosts investor confidence but may also attract more capital into Nike's stock. Nike's success reflects its ongoing competitiveness in the athletic apparel market, which could positively influence investment sentiment across the entire industry.

items.title: Kraken to launch agentic trading as crypto exchanges evolve beyond crypto
items.analysis_zh: Kraken正在准备重新推出其应用程序，核心功能为“代理交易”。这一举措标志着加密货币交易所的进一步发展，表明它们不仅限于传统的加密货币交易。代理交易的引入可能会吸引更多的用户，尤其是那些希望在加密市场中获得更高自主权的投资者。这一变化可能会影响整个加密货币市场的竞争格局，促使其他交易所也跟进类似的创新。
items.analysis_en: Kraken is preparing to relaunch its app with agentic trading as a core feature. This move signifies an evolution of cryptocurrency exchanges, indicating that they are moving beyond just traditional crypto trading. The introduction of agentic trading may attract more users, particularly those seeking greater autonomy in the crypto market. This shift could impact the competitive landscape of the entire cryptocurrency market, prompting other exchanges to adopt similar innovations.

items.title: BTIG starts DLR, EQIX at Buy, calls data center demand a multi-decade supercycle
items.analysis_zh: BTIG近期对数据中心相关公司的股票评级进行了调整，将Digital Realty（DLR）和Equinix（EQIX）评为“买入”。分析师指出，数据中心的需求正在进入一个持续数十年的超级周期。这一趋势不仅反映了数字化转型的加速，也可能对相关投资领域产生深远影响，吸引更多资本流入数据基础设施建设。
items.analysis_en: BTIG recently upgraded the stock ratings for data center companies, assigning a "Buy" rating to Digital Realty (DLR) and Equinix (EQIX). Analysts noted that the demand for data centers is entering a multi-decade supercycle. This trend not only reflects the acceleration of digital transformation but may also have significant implications for related investment sectors, drawing more capital into data infrastructure development.

健康.description: 医学、营养、抗衰老、代谢与公共健康

items.title: An Insider’s Guide to 6 of Vienna’s Splendid Public Pools
items.analysis_zh: 维也纳的公共游泳池为市民提供了一个消暑的理想场所。无论是想在水中畅游，还是在高大的菩提树下休息，这些游泳池都能满足不同需求。随着夏季的到来，公共游泳池的受欢迎程度显著上升，这不仅为当地居民提供了消遣的机会，也促进了社区的互动与交流。这些游泳池的存在有助于提升城市的生活质量，吸引更多游客前来体验维也纳的夏日魅力。
items.analysis_en: Vienna's public swimming pools offer an ideal place for residents to cool off during the summer. Whether one wants to swim laps or relax in the shade of towering linden trees, these pools cater to various preferences. As summer approaches, the popularity of these public pools increases significantly, providing leisure opportunities for locals and fostering community interaction. The presence of these pools enhances the quality of urban life and attracts more visitors to experience the charm of Vienna in the summer.

items.title: New MRI breakthrough reveals the brain and eye like never before
items.analysis_zh: 科学家们通过使用超材料重新设计了一种关键的MRI硬件，使现有的扫描仪能够在更短的时间内生成更清晰的图像。这一突破不仅可能改善疾病的诊断，还能让扫描过程更加舒适，并为新的医学成像和治疗应用开辟了道路。特别是，对深层脑结构和眼部周围组织的成像一直是医学成像中的难点，而这一新技术有望显著提高这些区域的成像效果。这项研究的成果将对临床医学产生深远影响，可能改变我们对多种疾病的检测和治疗方式。
items.analysis_en: Scientists have redesigned a key piece of MRI hardware using metamaterials, enabling existing scanners to produce clearer images in less time. This breakthrough could enhance disease diagnoses, make the scanning process more comfortable, and pave the way for new medical imaging and treatment applications. Imaging deep brain structures and the delicate tissues around the eye has always been challenging, and this new technology promises to significantly improve imaging in these areas. The findings from this research could have a profound impact on clinical medicine, potentially transforming how we detect and treat various diseases.

items.title: This frog bacterium wiped out cancer tumors in mice with a single dose
items.analysis_zh: 日本先进科学技术研究所的科学家发现了一种来自日本树蛙肠道的细菌，该细菌在小鼠实验中能够通过单次治疗完全消除结直肠肿瘤。这一发现不仅展示了细菌在癌症治疗中的潜力，也为未来开发新型癌症疗法提供了希望。研究表明，这种细菌通过直接攻击癌细胞和激活免疫系统来发挥作用，可能对多种实体瘤具有治疗效果。这项研究的成功为癌症治疗开辟了新的方向，值得进一步探索。
items.analysis_en: Scientists at the Japan Advanced Institute of Science and Technology have discovered a bacterium from the intestines of Japanese tree frogs that can completely eliminate colorectal tumors in mice with a single treatment. This finding not only highlights the potential of bacteria in cancer therapy but also offers hope for the development of new cancer treatments in the future. The research indicates that this bacterium works by directly attacking cancer cells and activating the immune system, which could be effective against various solid tumors. The success of this study opens new avenues for cancer treatment and warrants further investigation.

items.title: Scientists found a longevity diet that helped mice eat more and lose fat
items.analysis_zh: 科学家们发现了一种经过改良的地中海饮食，这种饮食低蛋白且含有适量的蛋氨酸，能够帮助老鼠在减脂的同时保持健康。这项研究表明，饮食中的蛋白质类型可能比摄入量更为重要。人类数据也显示，较低的动物蛋白摄入与肥胖和2型糖尿病的发生率降低相关，这意味着这种饮食方式可能对人类也有益处。这项发现不仅为老鼠的健康寿命提供了新的见解，也为人类的饮食选择提供了重要参考。
items.analysis_en: Researchers have discovered a modified Mediterranean diet that is low in protein and contains just the right amount of methionine, which helps mice reduce body fat while maintaining their health. This study suggests that the type of protein consumed may be more significant than the quantity. Additionally, human data indicates that lower animal protein intake is associated with reduced rates of obesity and Type 2 diabetes, implying that this dietary approach could also benefit humans. These findings not only offer new insights into extending healthspan in mice but also provide valuable guidance for human dietary choices.

items.title: Scientists just debunked a dangerous baby rattlesnake myth
items.analysis_zh: 一项新的研究揭穿了关于婴儿响尾蛇比成蛇更危险的长期误解。研究人员发现，年轻的响尾蛇与成蛇一样能够控制其毒液的释放，而成蛇通常会注入更多的毒液，导致更严重的咬伤。这一误解的传播源于数十年来的不准确新闻报道和误导性引用，造成了人们对响尾蛇的错误认知，进而引发了不必要的恐惧和错误的应对措施。了解这一真相对于减少人们的恐慌和提高对蛇咬伤的正确处理至关重要。
items.analysis_en: A new study has debunked the long-held belief that baby rattlesnakes are more dangerous than adults. Researchers found that young rattlesnakes can control their venom release just like adults, while adult snakes typically inject much larger amounts of venom, resulting in more severe bites. This misconception has spread through decades of inaccurate news reports and misleading quotes, leading to unnecessary fear and improper responses to snake encounters. Understanding this truth is crucial for reducing panic and improving the appropriate treatment of snake bites.

items.title: New York Sues Companies Over ‘Forever Chemicals’
items.analysis_zh: 纽约州对包括3M和杜邦在内的多家公司提起诉讼，指控它们污染环境并通过隐瞒PFAS化学物质的危害信息而欺诈公众。这一诉讼的重要性在于PFAS被称为“永恒化学物质”，对人类健康和环境造成潜在威胁。此案可能促使更多州采取类似行动，推动对这些化学物质的监管和清理工作。
items.analysis_en: New York has filed a lawsuit against several companies, including 3M and DuPont, accusing them of contaminating the environment and committing fraud by withholding information about the dangers of PFAS chemicals. This lawsuit is significant because PFAS, known as "forever chemicals," pose potential risks to human health and the environment. The case may encourage other states to take similar actions, leading to increased regulation and cleanup efforts regarding these chemicals.

items.title: Joseph Fraumeni, 93, Dies; Helped Discover Genetic Link to Cancer
items.analysis_zh: 约瑟夫·弗劳梅尼（Joseph Fraumeni）于93岁去世，他被认为是分子流行病学的创始人之一。他与弗雷德里克·P·李（Frederick P. Li）合作，发现了一种遗传性疾病，这种疾病会增加年轻人罹患癌症的风险。这一发现对癌症研究具有重要意义，帮助科学家们更好地理解癌症的遗传因素。弗劳梅尼的贡献将继续影响未来的医学研究和癌症预防策略。
items.analysis_en: Joseph Fraumeni passed away at the age of 93 and is regarded as one of the founders of molecular epidemiology. He collaborated with Frederick P. Li to identify a hereditary disorder that increases the risk of developing cancer at a young age. This discovery is significant for cancer research, as it enhances our understanding of the genetic factors involved in cancer. Fraumeni's contributions will continue to influence future medical research and cancer prevention strategies.

items.title: A hidden immune backup system could supercharge mRNA cancer vaccines
items.analysis_zh: 研究人员发现，mRNA癌症疫苗能够招募一种意想不到的免疫细胞，从而引发强大的抗肿瘤反应，这一发现颠覆了人们对疫苗工作机制的长期假设。这项研究的重要性在于，它可能会导致更有效的癌症疫苗问世，并帮助科学家为患者量身定制治疗方案。随着mRNA技术在癌症治疗中的应用前景越来越广泛，这一发现可能会改变癌症治疗的未来。
items.analysis_en: Researchers have discovered that mRNA cancer vaccines can recruit an unexpected immune cell to trigger powerful tumor-fighting responses, overturning a long-held belief about how these vaccines work. This finding is significant because it could lead to the development of more effective cancer vaccines and assist scientists in tailoring treatments for better patient outcomes. As the application of mRNA technology in cancer treatment grows, this discovery may reshape the future of cancer therapy.

心理/哲学.description: 心理学、行为、认知、哲学与意义讨论

items.title: Lore of the rings
items.analysis_zh: 树木中蕴藏着丰富的历史档案，记录着行星变迁、宇宙事件和历史转折的故事。科学家们正在逐步解锁这些信息，这不仅有助于我们理解地球的过去，也可能影响我们对未来环境变化的预测。通过研究树木年轮，我们能够更好地把握气候变化的趋势，从而为应对全球变暖提供重要依据。
items.analysis_en: Trees hold a rich archive of history, documenting tales of planetary shifts, cosmic events, and pivotal moments in history. Scientists are gradually unlocking this information, which not only helps us understand the Earth's past but may also influence our predictions about future environmental changes. By studying tree rings, we can better grasp the trends of climate change, providing crucial insights for addressing global warming.

items.title: New MRI breakthrough reveals the brain and eye like never before
items.analysis_zh: 科学家们通过使用超材料重新设计了一种关键的MRI硬件，使现有的扫描仪能够在更短的时间内生成更清晰的图像。这一突破不仅有助于改善诊断，还能使扫描过程更加舒适，并为新的医学成像和治疗应用开辟了可能性。尤其是对于深层脑结构和眼部周围的精细组织，以往的成像技术面临很大挑战，而这一新技术的出现将极大提升医学影像学的效果，可能会对临床实践产生深远影响。
items.analysis_en: Scientists have redesigned a key piece of MRI hardware using metamaterials, enabling existing scanners to produce clearer images in less time. This breakthrough is significant as it could enhance diagnoses, make scans more comfortable, and open up new possibilities for medical imaging and treatment applications. The technology particularly addresses challenges in imaging deep brain structures and delicate tissues around the eye, which have been difficult to visualize with previous methods. Its introduction may have a profound impact on clinical practices in various medical fields.

AI 科技.description: AI、芯片、软件、科技产业与研究进展

items.title: Disney Plus is reportedly looking into a free streaming tier
items.analysis_zh: 迪士尼Plus正在考虑推出一个免费的流媒体服务，旨在吸引更多观众。根据《商业内幕》的报道，迪士尼首席产品和技术官亚当·史密斯在公司会议上提到这一想法。这一举措的重要性在于，面对YouTube等竞争对手，迪士尼需要寻找新的方式来吸引观众的注意力。虽然目前尚不清楚哪些内容会包含在免费服务中，但这一策略可能会影响迪士尼Plus的用户增长和市场竞争力。
items.analysis_en: Disney Plus is reportedly considering a free streaming tier to attract more viewers. According to a report from Business Insider, Adam Smith, Disney's chief product and technology officer, mentioned this idea during a company town hall meeting. This move is significant as Disney seeks to capture audience attention in the face of competition from platforms like YouTube. While it remains unclear which content would be included in the free tier, this strategy could impact Disney Plus's user growth and overall market competitiveness.

items.title: Anker’s 3-in-1 Qi2.2 charging station is $95 off
items.analysis_zh: 安克（Anker）推出的3合1 Qi2.2无线充电站目前降价95美元，售价仅为134.99美元。这款充电站能够同时为MagSafe兼容的iPhone、Apple Watch和AirPods充电，非常适合希望简化桌面空间的用户。此次降价使得产品价格达到了历史新低，可能会吸引更多消费者购买，从而提升安克在无线充电市场的竞争力。
items.analysis_en: Anker's 3-in-1 Qi2.2 wireless charging station is currently discounted by $95, bringing the price down to $134.99. This charging station can charge a MagSafe-compatible iPhone, Apple Watch, and AirPods simultaneously, making it ideal for users looking to declutter their nightstands. The price drop to an all-time low may attract more consumers, potentially enhancing Anker's competitiveness in the wireless charging market.

items.title: I spent a week using the Trump phone — it sucks
items.analysis_zh: 特朗普手机从一开始就没有被视为一款真正的手机。去年六月发布时，其模糊的渲染图和不连贯的规格表就让人质疑其可信度。两周后，特朗普移动公司承认该手机不会在美国生产，这进一步削弱了其形象。尽管最终发布的手机在外观上有所改进，但其性能依然不尽如人意。这款售价499美元的手机可能会影响消费者对品牌的信任，尤其是在智能手机市场竞争激烈的情况下。
items.analysis_en: The Trump phone was never considered a serious device from the start. When it was announced last June, its unclear renders and incoherent specifications raised doubts about its credibility. Just two weeks later, Trump Mobile admitted that the phone would not be manufactured in the U.S., further damaging its reputation. Although the final version of the phone showed some improvements in appearance, its performance still fell short. Priced at $499, this phone may affect consumer trust in the brand, especially in a highly competitive smartphone market.

items.title: How Terrorist Groups Are Using A.I. to Gain an Edge in Battle
items.analysis_zh: 最新研究表明，恐怖组织不仅将人工智能聊天机器人作为宣传工具，还利用它们来协助制造炸弹和策划攻击。这一发现引发了广泛关注，因为它揭示了技术在恐怖活动中可能被滥用的方式。这种情况不仅对国家安全构成威胁，也可能改变反恐策略，促使各国加强对人工智能技术的监管和控制。
items.analysis_en: Recent research has found that terrorist groups are using AI chatbots not only as propaganda tools but also to assist in bomb construction and attack planning. This revelation has raised significant concerns as it highlights the potential misuse of technology in terrorist activities. Such developments pose a threat to national security and may alter counter-terrorism strategies, prompting countries to enhance regulations and controls over AI technologies.

items.title: I’m filling in at The Verge for 6 weeks. Ask me anything!
items.analysis_zh: 科技记者大卫将在《The Verge》担任为期六周的临时编辑，期间将主持一个仅限订阅者的问答活动。这一变化不仅意味着大卫将负责报道苹果、谷歌和三星等公司的新产品发布，还为读者提供了与他互动的机会。大卫在科技领域有着丰富的经验，他的加入将为读者带来新的视角和见解。这一活动可能会吸引更多科技爱好者关注《The Verge》，并提升平台的互动性。
items.analysis_en: Technology reporter David will be filling in as a temporary editor at The Verge for six weeks, during which he will host a subscriber-only Q&A session. This change means that David will cover new product releases from companies like Apple, Google, and Samsung, while also providing readers with an opportunity to interact with him. With extensive experience in the tech field, his presence is expected to bring fresh perspectives and insights to the audience. This event may attract more tech enthusiasts to The Verge and enhance the platform's interactivity.

items.title: Empathy for the optimizers
items.analysis_zh: 生物黑客布莱恩·约翰逊（Bryan Johnson）最近宣布自己患有一种无法治愈的自身免疫性疾病，这一消息引发了广泛的讨论。约翰逊以追求长生不老而闻名，他的健康实验涉及大量补充剂和严格的生活方式管理。此次疾病的曝光不仅让人们重新审视他的健康理念，也引发了对生物黑客运动的反思。这一事件可能会影响公众对极端健康追求的看法，尤其是在科学与个人健康之间的平衡问题上。
items.analysis_en: Biohacker Bryan Johnson recently announced that he has an incurable autoimmune disease, sparking widespread discussion. Known for his quest for immortality, Johnson's health experiments involve numerous supplements and strict lifestyle management. This revelation not only prompts a reevaluation of his health philosophy but also encourages reflection on the biohacking movement as a whole. The incident may influence public perceptions of extreme health pursuits, particularly regarding the balance between science and personal health.

items.title: Instagram’s Adam Mosseri: If you don’t like AI, ‘then you shouldn’t have it in your feed’
items.analysis_zh: Instagram的负责人亚当·莫塞里（Adam Mosseri）表示，平台不会过滤掉人工智能（AI）内容，但如果用户不喜欢这些内容，他们“就不应该出现在自己的信息流中”。他在一次播客采访中提到，虽然不想完全排除AI内容，但希望用户能够清楚地知道哪些内容是由AI生成的。这一观点引发了关于社交媒体内容管理的讨论，尤其是在AI内容日益普及的背景下。莫塞里的言论可能会影响用户对Instagram内容的接受度，并引发其他平台对类似政策的反思。
items.analysis_en: Adam Mosseri, the head of Instagram, stated that the platform will not filter out AI content, but if users dislike it, they "shouldn't have it in their feed." During a podcast interview, he emphasized the importance of users being informed about which content is AI-generated, even if he doesn't want to completely exclude it. This perspective has sparked discussions about content management on social media, especially as AI content becomes more prevalent. Mosseri's remarks may influence user acceptance of content on Instagram and prompt other platforms to reconsider similar policies.

items.title: Would you host part of an AI data center in your home?
items.analysis_zh: 太阳能和家庭储能公司Sunrun正在扩展其业务，推出了一项新的“分布式AI计算”计划。该计划并不是通过建造大型数据中心，而是通过向客户支付费用，鼓励他们在家中放置计算单元。这一创新举措旨在解决数据中心面临的空间和资源问题，尤其是在越来越多的社区反对新数据中心建设的背景下。通过将计算能力分散到家庭中，Sunrun不仅可以满足企业对计算资源的需求，还可能缓解公众对环境影响的担忧。
items.analysis_en: Sunrun, a solar and home energy storage company, is expanding its operations by launching a new "distributed AI compute" program. Instead of building large data centers, the company will pay customers to host compute units in their homes. This innovative approach aims to address the challenges of space and resources faced by data centers, particularly as more communities oppose new constructions. By distributing computing power across households, Sunrun can meet enterprise demand for computing resources while potentially alleviating public concerns about environmental impacts.

items.title: Volkswagen Is Cutting Production as Sales in China Plunge
items.analysis_zh: 大众汽车因在中国的销量大幅下滑而削减生产。这一变化反映了德国汽车制造商在与快速崛起的中国企业竞争中的困难，这些企业提供更具价格竞争力和技术先进的电动汽车。这一趋势不仅影响大众汽车的市场份额，也可能对整个汽车行业的格局产生深远影响，促使其他传统汽车制造商加快转型步伐。
items.analysis_en: Volkswagen is cutting production due to a significant drop in sales in China. This shift highlights the challenges faced by the German automaker in competing with rapidly growing Chinese companies that offer more affordable and technologically advanced electric vehicles. This trend not only affects Volkswagen's market share but could also have far-reaching implications for the entire automotive industry, prompting other traditional manufacturers to accelerate their transformation efforts.

items.title: Xreal’s new AR glasses are way cheaper and almost just right
items.analysis_zh: Xreal推出了新的AR眼镜A01 Plus，售价为299美元，比其449美元的1S版本便宜。这款新眼镜虽然功能较少，但保留了1S的一些优点，设计轻巧且舒适，显示效果也令人惊喜。此举不仅让更多消费者能够体验AR技术，也可能促使其他品牌推出更具性价比的产品，从而推动整个市场的发展。
items.analysis_en: Xreal has launched its new AR glasses, the A01 Plus, priced at $299, making them significantly cheaper than the $449 1S model. While the new glasses have fewer features, they retain some of the best qualities of the 1S, offering a lightweight and comfortable design with surprisingly good display quality. This move not only makes AR technology more accessible to a wider audience but may also encourage other brands to develop more affordable products, potentially driving growth in the overall market.

美学.description: 艺术、设计、摄影、建筑、审美与文化

items.title: Five Action Movies to Stream Now
items.analysis_zh: 最近，《纽约时报》推荐了五部值得观看的动作电影，这些影片包括了功夫家庭、叛逆刺客等元素。这些电影不仅能为观众带来刺激的视觉体验，还能通过紧张的剧情和丰富的人物关系吸引观众。选择合适的电影可以提升观影体验，尤其是在家庭聚会或朋友聚会时。此类推荐有助于观众发现新片，拓宽他们的观影视野。
items.analysis_en: Recently, The New York Times recommended five action movies worth watching, featuring elements like karate-chopping families and rogue assassins. These films not only provide an exciting visual experience but also engage viewers with their intense plots and rich character dynamics. Choosing the right movie can enhance the viewing experience, especially during family gatherings or with friends. Such recommendations help audiences discover new films and broaden their cinematic horizons.

items.title: ‘The Man Will Burn’: On Filming the Sacred and Propane at Burning Man
items.analysis_zh: 一部新的四集纪录片系列的导演讨论了为什么这个长期举办的沙漠节日如此重要，并形容其体验就像置身“另一个星球”。这部纪录片探讨了“燃烧人”节的独特文化和艺术表现形式，强调了其对参与者的深远影响。这样的节日不仅是艺术的展示，更是人们探索自我和社会关系的机会，可能会激发更多人对参与和创作的兴趣。
items.analysis_en: The directors of a new four-part docuseries discussed the significance of the long-running desert festival, describing the experience as being on "another planet." This documentary explores the unique culture and artistic expressions of the Burning Man festival, highlighting its profound impact on participants. Such events are not only showcases of art but also opportunities for individuals to explore themselves and their social connections, potentially inspiring more people to engage in creative participation.

items.title: How Olivia Wilde Directed an Awkward Dance in ‘The Invite’
items.analysis_zh: 导演兼演员奥利维亚·王尔德在她的新电影《邀请函》中分析了一场充满紧张气氛的舞蹈场景。这一场景的独特处理方式不仅展示了角色之间的复杂关系，也反映了影片整体的情感基调。王尔德的解读让观众更深入地理解了角色的内心冲突和情感张力，这对影片的成功至关重要。这样的创作手法可能会影响未来导演在处理类似场景时的选择。
items.analysis_en: Director and actress Olivia Wilde breaks down a tension-filled dance scene from her new film "The Invite." This unique approach to the scene not only highlights the complex relationships between the characters but also reflects the overall emotional tone of the film. Wilde's interpretation allows viewers to gain a deeper understanding of the characters' inner conflicts and emotional tensions, which is crucial for the film's success. Such creative techniques may influence how future directors choose to handle similar scenes.

items.title: living plants grow on perforated aluminum climate installation at new york botanical garden
items.analysis_zh: 纽约植物园推出了一项新的气候装置，该装置以穿孔铝材为基础，支持活植物的生长。这一创新的温室设计旨在重新定义植物栖息地，提供一个适应气候变化的庇护所。这项安装不仅展示了植物与环境的和谐共生，还可能激励其他地区在应对气候变化时采用类似的可持续设计理念。
items.analysis_en: The New York Botanical Garden has unveiled a new climate installation made of perforated aluminum that supports the growth of living plants. This innovative greenhouse design aims to redefine plant habitats, providing a refuge that adapts to climate change. The installation not only showcases the harmonious coexistence of plants and their environment but may also inspire similar sustainable design approaches in other regions facing climate challenges.

items.title: 7 New Movies Our Critics Are Talking About This Week
items.analysis_zh: 本周，评论家们推荐了七部新电影，这些影片在影迷中引起了广泛关注。这些电影涵盖了不同的题材和风格，适合各种类型的观众。了解这些影片不仅能丰富观众的观影选择，还可能影响票房表现和电影产业的趋势。
items.analysis_en: This week, critics have highlighted seven new movies that are generating significant buzz among film enthusiasts. These films span various genres and styles, appealing to a wide range of audiences. Knowing about these films can enrich viewers' choices and may also influence box office performance and trends within the film industry.

items.title: Hershel Parker, Melville Scholar of Ahab-Like Obsessiveness, Dies at 90
items.analysis_zh: 赫舍尔·帕克，这位著名的梅尔维尔学者，近日去世，享年90岁。他以其详尽的两卷本传记而闻名，展现了他对梅尔维尔作品的执着与热爱。帕克的研究不仅丰富了文学界对梅尔维尔的理解，也激励了后续学者深入探索经典文学的深层意义。他的离世标志着一个学术时代的结束，可能会影响梅尔维尔研究的未来方向。
items.analysis_en: Hershel Parker, a renowned Melville scholar, recently passed away at the age of 90. He was known for his exhaustive two-volume biography, which showcased his obsession and passion for Melville's works. Parker's research not only enriched the literary community's understanding of Melville but also inspired future scholars to delve deeper into the profound meanings of classic literature. His passing marks the end of an academic era and may influence the future direction of Melville studies.

items.title: Dinaw Mengestu Resigns as PEN America President After 7 Months in Role
items.analysis_zh: 作家迪纳·孟格斯图在担任PEN America主席仅七个月后辞职，原因是该组织在对加沙战争的反应上出现了分歧。这一事件引发了广泛关注，因为PEN America作为一个重要的文学团体，其立场和行动对作家和文化界有着深远的影响。孟格斯图的辞职可能会导致该组织在未来的方向和政策上出现更多的不确定性，进而影响其在文学和人权领域的声誉。
items.analysis_en: Novelist Dinaw Mengestu has resigned as president of PEN America after just seven months, primarily due to divisions within the organization regarding its response to the war in Gaza. This situation has garnered significant attention, as PEN America plays a crucial role in the literary community, and its stance can greatly influence writers and cultural discussions. Mengestu's resignation may lead to further uncertainty in the organization's future direction and policies, potentially affecting its reputation in the realms of literature and human rights.

items.title: ‘The Chosen’ Studio Is Accused of Shortchanging Crowdfunders
items.analysis_zh: 一位前股东对《被选者》制作公司提起诉讼，指控该公司在私有化过程中未能公平补偿他。这起诉讼引发了对众筹投资者权益的关注，尤其是在影视行业中，许多人通过众筹支持项目。此事件可能会影响未来影视项目的融资方式，促使更多投资者关注他们的权益保障。
items.analysis_en: A former shareholder has filed a lawsuit against the studio behind "The Chosen," claiming he was not fairly compensated during the company's transition to private ownership. This lawsuit raises concerns about the rights of crowdfunders, particularly in the film industry where many individuals financially support projects through crowdfunding. The situation may influence how future film projects are financed, encouraging more investors to pay attention to their rights and protections.

items.title: Seven products by USA-based design brands
items.analysis_zh: 最近，美国的一些设计品牌推出了七款新产品，这些产品涵盖了沙发、工作站、地板、墙面装饰、办公家具、独特照明和表面材料等多个领域。这些设计不仅展示了美国品牌的创新能力，也反映了当前的美学趋势。这些产品的发布可能会影响消费者的选择，推动市场对高质量设计的需求。
items.analysis_en: Recently, several design brands based in the USA launched seven new products, which include sofas, workstations, flooring, wall coverings, office furniture, statement lighting, and surfaces. These designs not only showcase the innovative capabilities of American brands but also reflect current aesthetic trends. The release of these products may influence consumer choices and drive demand for high-quality design in the market.

items.title: ‘heritage is not a static archive’: GUNIA on reinventing ukraine’s craft and material traditions
items.analysis_zh: 乌克兰品牌GUNIA的创始人娜塔莉亚·卡门斯卡和玛丽亚·加夫里柳克与150多位工匠合作，致力于保护和重塑乌克兰的传统工艺和材料。她们强调，遗产并非静态的档案，而是一个不断演变的过程。这一举措不仅有助于传承乌克兰的文化遗产，还能为当地工匠提供新的经济机会，促进传统工艺在现代社会中的应用和发展。
items.analysis_en: Ukrainian brand GUNIA, founded by Natalia Kamenska and Maria Gavryliuk, collaborates with over 150 artisans to preserve and reinvent traditional crafts and materials of Ukraine. They emphasize that heritage is not a static archive but a dynamic process that evolves over time. This initiative not only helps to sustain Ukraine's cultural heritage but also provides new economic opportunities for local artisans, fostering the application and development of traditional crafts in contemporary society.
